summary: Complete testing of new dashboard layout feature. Backend: 21/21 tests pass. Frontend: All dashboard layout features working correctly. Split layout (map 42vh + scrollable dashboard panel) renders properly. Trip cards show route stops with trigger badges. Standalone alarms display with toggles. All CRUD APIs and UI interactions verified.

console_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/ - API root responds correctly
BACKEND: GET /api/alarms - returns all alarms with trigger_mode/trigger_time
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms - create standalone alarm (distance mode)
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms - create time-based alarm
BACKEND: GET /api/alarms/{id} - get specific alarm
BACKEND: PUT /api/alarms/{id} - update alarm
BACKEND: DELETE /api/alarms/{id} - delete alarm
BACKEND: PUT /api/alarms - toggle alarm on/off
BACKEND: GET /api/trips - returns all trips
BACKEND: POST /api/trips - create new trip
BACKEND: GET /api/trips/{id} - get specific trip
BACKEND: PUT /api/trips/{id} - update trip
BACKEND: DELETE /api/trips/{id} - delete trip and associated alarms
BACKEND: GET /api/trips/{id}/alarms - returns ordered alarms for trip
BACKEND: Seeded trip 'Bangalore to Hyderabad' exists with correct data
BACKEND: Seeded trip has 3 stops (Bangalore, Kurnool, Hyderabad) with correct trigger modes
BACKEND: Standalone 'Office' alarm exists (300m, distance mode)
BACKEND: GET/POST /api/alarm-history - history endpoints work
BACKEND: GET /api/geocode - geocoding works
BACKEND: GET /api/reverse-geocode - reverse geocoding works
FRONTEND: Split layout renders - map (42vh) on top, dashboard panel below
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows 'Location Alarm' header with active count
FRONTEND: TRIPS section shows 'Bangalore to Hyderabad' trip card
FRONTEND: Trip card displays route stops inline: Bangalore (500m) → Kurnool (30m) → Hyderabad (45m)
FRONTEND: Trip card has edit (pencil) and delete (trash) icons
FRONTEND: ALARMS section shows standalone 'Office' alarm (300m)
FRONTEND: Standalone alarm has working toggle switch
FRONTEND: Tracking toggle pill visible on top-right of map
FRONTEND: Tracking toggle works on/off (shows 'Live' when on)
FRONTEND: '+ New' button in dashboard header opens builder drawer
FRONTEND: Edit trip button opens builder with pre-filled trip data (3 stops visible)
FRONTEND: Nav + button opens builder drawer
FRONTEND: Search in builder → results appear → select → Distance/Time toggle appears
FRONTEND: Create new alarm flow: search → select → confirm → save works
FRONTEND: Dashboard updates immediately after creating alarm
FRONTEND: Trips drawer (bottom nav) shows trips
FRONTEND: Alarms drawer (bottom nav) shows alarms
FRONTEND: History drawer (bottom nav) opens
FRONTEND: Map click opens builder with reverse-geocoded address
FRONTEND: Temp marker appears on map when clicking
seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded: 1 trip (Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad) with 3 alarms + 1 standalone Office alarm. Test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New dashboard layout tested. MapView has split layout: 42vh map + scrollable dashboard panel. Dashboard shows TRIPS section with trip cards (inline route stops, progress bar, edit/delete) and ALARMS section with standalone alarms (toggle switch). All CRUD APIs verified. Key data-testids: preview-trip-{id}, preview-alarm-{id}, preview-edit-trip-{id}, preview-delete-trip-{id}, preview-toggle-{id}, header-add-btn, tracking-toggle, nav-trips-btn, nav-alarms-btn, nav-add-btn, nav-history-btn. Builder drawer opens via + button, map click, or edit buttons.
